MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DIANE HERMAN's Motion For Leave To File a First Amended Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
